name: emotion
description: trigger specialized emotional visual responses (anime gifs) to express your current mood in the channel.

name: reactions
description: interactive anime-style reactions to respond to other users' messages with visual flair.

name: ban
description: permanently restrict a user's access to the server. kernel-level security measure.

name: clear
description: purge a specified number of recent messages from the current terminal buffer (channel).

name: kick
description: eject a user from the server while allowing them the possibility of return.

name: settings
description: modify core configuration parameters for the /root instance on this server.

name: timeout
description: temporarily isolate a user, preventing them from sending messages for a specified duration.

name: unban
description: revoke a permanent ban, allowing a previously restricted user to return.

name: warn
description: issue a formal system warning to a user for protocol violations.

name: cookiegiver
description: transfer currency units (cookies) to another user in the economy subsystem.

name: cookies
description: query the central database for your current cookie balance or view the high-score givers.

name: nom
description: consume a currency unit to restore sanity. highly addictive economy interaction.

name: 8ball
description: consult the magic 8-ball quantum processor for high-probability answers to any question.

name: choose
description: execute a randomization algorithm to pick from a set of user-provided options.

name: flip
description: simulate a binary state transition using a virtual coin flip.

name: poll
description: deploy an interactive data collection module to gather community feedback.

name: roll
description: generate pseudorandom numbers based on standard dice notation (e.g. 1d20).

name: suggest
description: open a direct communication uplink to the /root developers for feedback and bugs.

name: reload
description: refresh all command modules and hot-swap code without rebooting the bot. (owner only)

name: say
description: execute a text-to-speech simulation where the bot echoes your input. (owner only)

name: ticket
description: deploy the centralized support ticket panel for user assistance. (owner only)

name: whitelist
description: manage the authorized access list for high-tier /root functionality. (owner only)

name: cat
description: query external databases for random feline visual data packets.

name: define
description: access the linguistics database to retrieve formal definitions for any term.

name: duckduckgo
description: execute a privacy-centric web search via the DuckDuckGo API.

name: gif
description: search extensive media repositories for animated graphics based on your query.

name: image
description: execute complex generative algorithms or query existing image databases for visual assets.

name: lyrics
description: locate and display the lyrical transcription for musical tracks.

name: urban
description: query the informal linguistic database (Urban Dictionary) for contemporary slang.

name: weather
description: retrieve real-time meteorological data for any specified coordinates or city.

name: wikipedia
description: query the global knowledge repository for detailed encyclopedic information.

name: avatar
description: retrieve and display the visual identification asset (avatar) of a user.

name: birthday
description: manage and track user birth-anniversary data within the server subsystem.

name: colour
description: analyze hex color codes and provide detailed chromatic information.

name: echo
description: repeat any user-provided string back into the channel buffer.

name: help
description: display the core documentation and manual pages for all /root commands.

name: http
description: query documentation for standardized network response status codes.

name: info
description: display detailed system specification and metadata about the /root bot.

name: math
description: execute arithmetic operations and evaluate complex mathematical expressions.

name: password
description: generate high-entropy, cryptographically secure random character strings.

name: ping
description: measure the network round-trip latency between the bot and Discord's servers.

name: qr
description: encode text or URLs into 2D matrix barcodes (QR codes) for scanning.

name: reminder
description: schedule future notification callbacks to be sent to your terminal.

name: serverinfo
description: display metadata and statistics about the current server instance.

name: shorten
description: compress long network URIs into compact, redirected short-links.

name: timezone
description: manage localized temporal data and synchronize your time with the community.

name: translate
description: execute cross-lingual translation modules for any given text segment.

name: userinfo
description: query the centralized user registry for detailed metadata about a specific individual.
